
// :go
// V_boolean_from_booleann
func V_boolean_from_booleann(
 booleann bool) *Type_boolean {
 var output *Type_boolean = C_false
 if booleann {
  output = C_true
 }
 return output
}
// :swift
// v_boolean_from_booleann
public static func v_boolean_from_booleann(
  _ booleann : Bool
) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
  var output : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
  if booleann {
    output = Vx_Core.c_true
  }
  return output
}
